About Lansing Area Track Club

A Lansing-area youth track club created by Ramon Brunson, serving young athletes and their families across Lansing and Mid-Michigan since 2015.

Our Story

The club began organically in 2015 when Ramon, his wife, and friends started training their children. The original group included Ramon's four children and five children of friends, a small gathering that sparked something bigger.

What started with a simple idea of getting kids together to train has grown into a community-centered youth track program serving families across Lansing and Mid-Michigan.

This website serves as the club's central online home, making it easier for families to find information, register athletes, and stay connected.

Join Our Club
2015

Serving Lansing Youth Since

Started with 9 kids, grown to serve the community

Our Mission

Lansing Area Track Club helps teach track, running, proper technique, discipline, confidence, and athlete development to youth in the Lansing area.

From practices and meets to community races and local events, our goal is to give Lansing-area athletes a place to train, compete, and belong.

Our Values

These core values guide everything we do at Lansing Area Track Club.

Community First

We believe in building a supportive community where every athlete feels welcome and valued.

Proper Technique

Our programs focus on correct running form, track events, and progressive athlete development.

Inclusive Environment

Athletes of all skill levels and backgrounds are welcome. We meet you where you are.

Character Development

We develop more than athletic ability. We build discipline, confidence, and leadership.

Our Programs

Age-appropriate programs designed to meet athletes where they are.

Youth Track (Elementary)

Introduction to track and field fundamentals in a fun, engaging environment.

Training Focus:

  • Sprints
  • Distance Running
  • Relays
  • Long Jump
  • Movement Basics

Middle School Athletes

Progressive training that builds on fundamentals while introducing competitive elements.

Training Focus:

  • All Running Events
  • Field Events
  • Cross Country Prep
  • Strength Training Intro

High School Athletes

Advanced training for off-season speed, endurance, and conditioning support.

Training Focus:

  • Speed Training
  • Endurance Building
  • Event Specialization
  • Strength & Conditioning

Meet Coach Ramon Brunson

RB

Founder & Head Coach

Ramon Brunson founded Lansing Area Track Club in 2015 with a simple vision: get kids active and help them grow through track and running.

Ramon is also the creator of Run Tha City 517, a Lansing community running group that started in June 2022.

Our Vision: Year-Round Training

LATC is working toward a planned indoor practice facility that would help provide year-round training and a safe, structured environment for athletes regardless of Michigan weather.

Support the 5K Contact Us

Our Sponsors & Partners

We are grateful for the support of local businesses and organizations that help make our programs possible.

Interested in supporting youth athletics in Lansing? We welcome community partners, sponsors, volunteers, and donors.

Become a Sponsor

Lansing Area

Track Club

Helping youth athletes in Lansing, Michigan build speed, endurance, confidence, and discipline through track, running, and community since 2015.

Serving Lansing, East Lansing, Okemos, Holt, Waverly, Delta Township and surrounding Mid-Michigan communities.
